problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Combining Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
